top_pain_points.description: PMs spending over 30 percent of time on status reporting chores
Follow-up items from meetings getting lost between tools

emerging_signals: Increased interest in AI-assisted demo readout generation from three enterprise prospects
Support tickets mentioning difficulty tracking what changed between sprints

churn_risks.signal: NPS dropped from 45 to 38 over two months due to manual status reporting burden

expansion_opportunities: Startup PMs requesting lean discovery workflow after seeing enterprise demo
Three accounts asking for portfolio-level rollup across multiple product workspaces

voice_of_customer_quotes.quote: I wish I could just approve a draft status update instead of writing one from scratch every week.
The prototype-first approach already saved us a week of alignment meetings.
